text.title: codemod-recipe-library Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the codemod-recipe-library methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Author writes a sed script that touches strings inside comments and breaks tests.
antipattern.fix: Rewrite using jscodeshift / ast-grep; keep regex only as a last-resort comment-stripper.

antipattern.symptom: Recipe ships without before/after; next framework release silently breaks it.
CI does not run the recipe; regression discovered weeks later.
Recipe targets react@17 but is still tagged in the library after upgrade.
antipattern.fix: Move stale recipes to archive/ subfolder; bump version on every framework minor.
